positive: A minimalist, whimsical forest scene designed for apparel art. Featuring stylized, geometric forest animals (deer, fox, bear) and abstracted flora (mushrooms, ferns). The style should evoke Scandinavian folk art and modern abstract illustration, using bold, limited color palettes of forest green, deep navy blue, ochre yellow, and charcoal black. The composition must be central and symmetrical, perfect for a chest print. Focus on strong silhouettes, clean line art, and high contrast suitable for linocut printing. Overhead view, highly detailed engraving style, --v 6.0 --style expressive --ar 1:1
